name: Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 each Chicken (roasted, skin removed, meat cut into bite-sized pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Roast the chicken and remove the skin. Cut the meat into bite-sized pieces.
2. Core out and cut apples into bite-sized chunks.
3. Core out and cut celery into thin slices.
4. Finely mince red onion.
5. Combine all dressing ingredients in a bowl. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed, including crushing fresh pineapple into the dressing for added flavor.
6. Mix the chicken with fruit, nuts, and dressing until well combined.
7. Serve on a platter lined with red cabbage and green savoy cabbage leaves.
